libraryDescription:
This library, system.Complex, provides utility functions for the complex type.

It also provides functions for performing complex-number operations with float[2] arrays and varfloat[2] arrayson implementations that do not support the complex type or the varcomplex type.

variable0.name: RE
variable0.description: The index of the real part when float[2] is treated as a complex number.

variable1.name: IM
variable1.description: The index of the imaginary part when float[2] is treated as a complex number.

function0.name: toComplex
function0.parameters: (float[] type) arg : The value to convert.

function1.name: toComplexArray
function1.description: Returns multiple complex values together as an array.
function1.parameters: (...complex[] type) args : The values to be collected into an array, as variable-length arguments.
function1.returnValue: (complex[] type) The array containing the argument values.

function2.name: toVarcomplexArray
function2.description: Returns multiple varcomplex values together as an array.
function2.parameters: (...varcomplex[] type) args : The values to be collected into an array, as variable-length arguments.
function2.returnValue: (varcomplex[] type) The array containing the argument values.

function3.name: toFloatArray
function3.parameters: (complex type) arg : The value to convert.

function4.name: toVarcomplex
function4.parameters: (varfloat[] type) arg : The value to convert.

function5.name: toVarfloatArray
function5.parameters: (varcomplex type) arg : The value to convert.

function6.name: creal
function6.description: Returns the real part of a complex number. This function directly wraps System.re( complex ).
function6.parameters: (complex type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function7.name: creal
function7.description: Returns the real part of a complex number. This function directly wraps System.re( varcomplex ).
function7.parameters: (varcomplex type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function8.name: creal
function8.description: Returns the real part of a complex number.
function8.parameters: (float[] type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function9.name: creal
function9.description: Returns the real part of a complex number.
function9.parameters: (varfloat[] type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function10.name: cimag
function10.description: Returns the imaginary part of a complex number. This function directly wraps System.im( complex ).
function10.parameters: (complex type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function11.name: cimag
function11.description: Returns the imaginary part of a complex number. This function directly wraps System.im( varcomplex ).
function11.parameters: (varcomplex type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function12.name: cimag
function12.parameters: (float[] type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function13.name: cimag
function13.parameters: (varfloat[] type) arg : The value of the complex number.

function14.name: cadd
function14.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the addition result.
function14.parameters:
(float[] type) a : The left operand. 
(float[] type) b : The right operand.

function15.name: cadd
function15.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the addition result.
function15.parameters:
(varfloat[] type) a : The left operand. 
(varfloat[] type) b : The right operand.

function16.name: csub
function16.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the subtraction result.
function16.parameters:
(float[] type) a : The left operand. 
(float[] type) b : The right operand.

function17.name: csub
function17.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the subtraction result.
function17.parameters:
(varfloat[] type) a : The left operand. 
(varfloat[] type) b : The right operand.

function18.name: cmul
function18.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the multiplication result.
function18.parameters:
(float[] type) a : The left operand. 
(float[] type) b : The right operand.

function19.name: cmul
function19.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the multiplication result.
function19.parameters:
(varfloat[] type) a : The left operand. 
(varfloat[] type) b : The right operand.

function20.name: cdiv
function20.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the division result.
function20.parameters:
(float[] type) a : The left operand. 
(float[] type) b : The right operand.

function21.name: cdiv
function21.description: Treats float[2] or varfloat[2] as a complex number and returns the division result.
function21.parameters:
(varfloat[] type) a : The left operand. 
(varfloat[] type) b : The right operand.
